description: A dramatic history painting depicting the Battle of La Hogue (1692), a naval engagement between English/Dutch and French fleets. The scene shows intense close-quarters combat with sailors and soldiers fighting in the water and on small boats amid burning ships. Smoke and flames fill the background. Flags of different nations are visible. The composition is chaotic and violent, capturing the ferocity of the engagement. The style is grand manner history painting characteristic of Benjamin West. No biblical or religious content is present.
